title: Crossotropis mollis

The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Crossotropis mollis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
